message:
Add DemoShowcase component for Try It section

Features:
- Responsive grid layout (1/2/3 columns)
- Optional category filtering (AI Tools, Dev Tools, Education)
- Staggered reveal animations via Framer Motion
- Respects prefers-reduced-motion
- First item featured styling
- Empty state handling
- Configurable heading and max items

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
